summary: close --auto-submit blocks only when an expense being newly bundled is still processing (intersection of processing AND unreported), not just any processing expense in the month.
reason: Two-iteration patch (Greptile flagged twice): original guard refused --auto-submit whenever any month-expense was still in Processing, even when that expense was already on a prior report. A stale autoscan from last week should not block this month's new batch. Now the guard intersects processing AND reportID == "" so only to-be-bundled expenses count.
